bindingBanner.title: English version is binding
bindingBanner.body: This page is provided in your language as a courtesy. The English version of this document is the legally binding text. In case of any conflict or ambiguity, the English version prevails.

privacy.summary1: We collect your name, email, and account info to provide the platform.
privacy.summary2: Payments are processed by Razorpay; we never store full card numbers.
privacy.summary3: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.summary4: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.summary5: Data is encrypted in transit and protected with industry-standard security.

terms.summary1: By using Flomerce you agree to these terms; you must be 18 or older.
terms.summary2: Subscription fees are billed in advance through Razorpay; prices are in INR.
terms.summary3: Flomerce is a SaaS platform — we do not handle payments made on your customers' websites; each merchant uses their own Razorpay account.
terms.summary4: You own your content; you may not sell illegal, prohibited, or restricted goods.
terms.summary5: Indian law governs this agreement; disputes go to courts in Karnataka, India.

refund.summary1: Flomerce is a digital service activated immediately upon payment.
refund.summary2: New subscribers can request a full refund within 7 days of first payment.
refund.summary3: Cancellation stops future renewals; the current period stays active until it ends.
refund.summary4: Duplicate charges and failed activations are refunded automatically.
refund.summary5: To request a refund, email support with your transaction ID.

shipping.summary1: Flomerce is a digital SaaS product — no physical goods are shipped by us.
shipping.summary2: Access to the platform is granted instantly after payment or trial activation.
shipping.summary3: Your e-commerce site goes live within seconds of creation.
shipping.summary4: Merchants are solely responsible for shipping and delivering products sold on their own stores.
